summary: P0 Features Testing Complete - All 4 requested features verified working: (1) Dashboard time period filters working correctly with all 11 options (today, yesterday, this_week, last_week, this_month, last_month, this_quarter, last_quarter, this_year, last_year, all_time), (2) Quick reassign from Sales/CS Kanban for super admin working - agent names clickable in blue, dropdown shows available agents, (3) Performance optimization with TTL caching verified via backend tests, (4) Customer Master shows enrolled customers with transaction history.

minor.issue: First test had transient connection error, but all subsequent period filter tests passed (20/21)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/dashboard/overall?period=today returns period='today'
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/overall?period=yesterday returns filtered data
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/overall?period=this_week returns filtered data
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/overall?period=last_week returns filtered data
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/overall?period=this_month returns filtered data
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/overall?period=last_month returns filtered data
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/overall?period=this_quarter returns filtered data
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/overall?period=last_quarter returns filtered data
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/overall?period=this_year returns filtered data
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/overall?period=last_year returns filtered data
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/overall?period=overall returns all-time data
Backend: This Month revenue (AED 287,591) <= All-Time revenue (AED 686,744)
Backend: Dashboard caching - TTLCache with 60s TTL working
Backend: GET /api/users?role=sales_executive returns 19 agents
Backend: GET /api/customers returns customer list with transactions
Backend: GET /api/students returns student list with CS agent info
Frontend: Dashboard at /dashboard loads with period filter dropdown
Frontend: Period dropdown shows all 11 options (Today through All Time)
Frontend: Selecting 'All Time' shows AED 686,744 overall revenue
Frontend: Selecting 'This Month' shows AED 287,591 overall revenue (lower than all-time)
Frontend: KPI cards display correctly (Overall Revenue, Sales, CS, Mentor)
Frontend: Sales CRM shows 1000 lead cards with Kanban columns
Frontend: Lead cards show agent name in blue clickable text (super admin only)
Frontend: Clicking agent name shows dropdown with 19 available agents
Frontend: Quick reassign dropdown includes: Kiran VR, Alwin Bose, Aleesha, etc.
Frontend: CS page Team Overview shows 216 students with agent breakdown
Frontend: Student cards show 'Agent: [name]' in blue clickable text
Frontend: CS quick reassign shows dropdown with 6 CS agents
Frontend: Customer Master shows 217 customers with Total Spent column
Frontend: Total Spent column is sortable (arrows visible)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend dashboard/overall endpoint (line 6127-6328) correctly implements period filter with _get_date_range() returning start/end dates for all 11 periods
Backend TTLCache class (lines 113-135) implements 60-second caching with cache_key including period for proper cache isolation
Frontend BirdsEyeDashboard.jsx uses PERIOD_OPTIONS array with all 11 filter options and proper data-testid attributes
Frontend SalesCRMPage.jsx LeadCard component (lines 95-268) shows clickable blue agent name for super_admin with reassign dropdown
Frontend CustomerServicePage.jsx StudentCard component (lines 84-247) shows clickable blue CS agent name with reassign dropdown
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 P0 features fully working: (1) Dashboard period filters at /dashboard - backend uses _get_date_range() to compute date ranges, frontend PERIOD_OPTIONS shows 11 options; (2) Quick reassign on lead/student cards - visible only for super_admin role, agent name appears in blue with hover:underline, clicking shows dropdown with available agents; (3) TTLCache with 60s TTL caches dashboard results keyed by period; (4) Customer Master at /customers shows all enrolled customers with Total Spent sortable column.

dashboard_period_filters.response_structure: revenue.selected_period contains filtered data, revenue.all_time contains cumulative totals

quick_reassign_sales.behavior: Agent name in blue text, click opens dropdown with available sales executives

quick_reassign_cs.behavior: Agent name in blue text, click opens dropdown with available CS agents

customer_master.features: Shows all customers from enrolled leads, Total Spent sortable column, transaction count
